title_hi: आप शांतिपूर्ण विरोध कर सकते हैं
body_en: Peaceful assembly and free expression are constitutional rights. Gathering to protest, without weapons and without violence, is protected.
body_hi: शांति से इकट्ठा होना और अपनी बात कहना आपका संवैधानिक अधिकार है। बिना हथियार और बिना हिंसा के विरोध करना संविधान से संरक्षित है।

law.text: All citizens shall have the right— (a) to freedom of speech and expression; (b) to assemble peaceably and without arms;

body_en: The police must tell you the grounds for your arrest. Ask clearly: what am I being arrested for? They have to answer.
body_hi: पुलिस को आपको गिरफ़्तारी का कारण बताना ज़रूरी है। साफ़ पूछें: मुझे किस अपराध में गिरफ़्तार किया जा रहा है? उन्हें जवाब देना होगा।

law.text: No person who is arrested shall be detained in custody without being informed, as soon as may be, of the grounds for such arrest nor shall he be denied the right to consult, and to be defended by, a legal practitioner of his choice.
The officer making an arrest must communicate the full particulars of the offence and the grounds of arrest to the person arrested.

title_en: For a bailable offence, you can be released
title_hi: ज़मानती अपराध में आपको छोड़ा जा सकता है
body_en: If the offence is bailable, the police must tell you that you can be released on bail and can arrange sureties.
body_hi: अगर अपराध ज़मानती है, तो पुलिस को आपको बताना होगा कि आप ज़मानत पर छूट सकते हैं और ज़मानतदार का इंतज़ाम कर सकते हैं।

law.text: Where a person is arrested for a bailable offence, the officer must inform them of their entitlement to be released on bail and to arrange sureties.

title_hi: आप वकील से मिल सकते हैं
body_en: You have the right to meet a lawyer of your choice during questioning. If you cannot afford one, the state must provide free legal aid.
body_hi: पूछताछ के दौरान अपनी पसंद के वकील से मिलना आपका अधिकार है। अगर आप वकील का खर्च नहीं उठा सकते, तो सरकार को मुफ़्त कानूनी सहायता देनी होगी।

law.text: No person who is arrested shall ... be denied the right to consult, and to be defended by, a legal practitioner of his choice.
No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law.
You may meet an advocate of your choice during interrogation; if you cannot afford one, the court must provide counsel at state expense.

title_en: Someone must be told you were taken
title_hi: किसी को बताया जाना चाहिए कि आपको ले जाया गया है
body_en: The police must inform a relative or friend of your choice that you have been arrested, and where you are being held.
body_hi: पुलिस को आपके किसी रिश्तेदार या दोस्त को बताना होगा कि आपको गिरफ़्तार किया गया है और आपको कहाँ रखा गया है।

law.text: The arresting officer must immediately inform a nominated relative or friend of the arrest and the place of detention.

body_en: You cannot be held longer than 24 hours (not counting travel time) without being produced before a magistrate.
body_hi: मजिस्ट्रेट के सामने पेश किए बिना आपको 24 घंटे से ज़्यादा नहीं रखा जा सकता (आने-जाने का समय इसमें नहीं गिना जाता)।

law.text: Every person who is arrested and detained in custody shall be produced before the nearest magistrate within a period of twenty-four hours of such arrest excluding the time necessary for the journey from the place of arrest to the court of the magistrate and no such person shall be detained in custody beyond the said period without the authority of a magistrate.
A person arrested without a warrant may not be detained more than 24 hours without being produced before a magistrate, excluding reasonable travel time.

body_en: Police may not use more restraint than is necessary to stop you escaping. Routine handcuffing is not allowed.
body_hi: पुलिस आपको भागने से रोकने के लिए जितना ज़रूरी हो, उससे ज़्यादा बल नहीं लगा सकती। हर बार हथकड़ी लगाना सही नहीं है।

law.text: The person making an arrest shall not use more restraint than is necessary to prevent escape.

law.code: Prem Shankar Shukla v. Delhi Admin. (1980)
law.text: The Supreme Court held routine handcuffing to be prima facie inhuman and unconstitutional; restraint must be justified case by case.

body_en: As a rule, a woman should not be arrested between sunset and sunrise. Any exception needs a woman officer and a magistrate's prior permission.
body_hi: आमतौर पर किसी महिला को सूरज डूबने के बाद और सूरज निकलने से पहले गिरफ़्तार नहीं किया जा सकता। अपवाद में महिला अधिकारी और मजिस्ट्रेट की पहले से अनुमति ज़रूरी है।

law.text: As a rule no woman shall be arrested after sunset and before sunrise; in exceptional cases a woman officer must make a written report and obtain the prior permission of the Judicial Magistrate first class.

title_en: You do not have to incriminate yourself
title_hi: आपको अपने ख़िलाफ़ गवाही देने की ज़रूरत नहीं
body_en: Say your name. You are not required to answer questions that could be used against you. Do not sign anything you have not read.
body_hi: अपना नाम बताएं। जो सवाल आपके ख़िलाफ़ इस्तेमाल हो सकते हैं, उनका जवाब देना ज़रूरी नहीं। बिना पढ़े किसी कागज़ पर दस्तख़त न करें।

law.text: No person accused of any offence shall be compelled to be a witness against himself.
A confession made to a police officer is generally not admissible against the accused.
